stages.label: Select viewport source slices
stages.output: Viewport-bounded layer inputs chosen from FlatGeobuf, PMTiles metadata, or JSON fallback contracts.
stages.fallback_behavior: Use the JSON and GeoJSON fallback payloads declared in the read-model catalog when binary slices are unavailable.

stages.label: Hydrate scene context
stages.output: Scene metadata, scenario deltas, and runtime gates narrowed to the requested viewport, lens, and time window.
stages.fallback_behavior: Use the accepted scene manifest directly when Mosaic or DuckDB worker bootstrap is unavailable.

stages.label: Assemble typed packet
stages.output: Typed attribute buffers plus packet metadata for renderer-specific adapters.
stages.fallback_behavior: Render the smaller fallback feature payloads directly until packet artifacts are published.

notes: This contract makes the scene packet compiler a fixture-backed runtime boundary before the packet builder exists.
The output contract stays renderer-agnostic so a later native client can reuse the same scene packet model.
